identity.name: Skwachàys Lodge
identity.address: 31 W Pender St, Vancouver, BC V6B 6N9

discovery.text: Canada's first Indigenous arts hotel. 18 one-of-a-kind guest suites, each designed by a different Indigenous artist. Street-level Indigenous art gallery. 40-foot totem pole in lobby. Supports Indigenous artist residencies. Maximum character — every room tells a different story. From $162 CAD/night. Rating 4.5/5 (413 reviews). Walking distance to Gastown, Chinatown, Railtown. The most unique hotel option — nothing else like it.

narrative.summary: Canada's first Indigenous arts hotel. 18 one-of-a-kind guest suites, each designed by a different Indigenous artist.
